title: six6 Approved Decision V2
description: One JSONL record produced by human review when a memory candidate is approved for ingestion. candidate_id is retained for routing, audit, and ingestion lookup only; it must not be reused directly as the final FalkorDB Memory.id.

candidate_id.description: Candidate-layer stable identifier retained for review routing, audit traceability, and idempotent ingestion lookup. It is not the final FalkorDB Memory.id.

topic.description: Short title approved for the memory record.

content.description: Approved distilled memory content, not a raw source backup.

timestamp.description: Source event time when known; otherwise candidate generation time.

maturity.description: Approved maturity level carried from the candidate or adjusted by human review.

source.description: Logical source path or process name retained for ingestion provenance.

source_file.description: Physical source file retained for audit and ingestion provenance.

source_section.description: Source heading or section name when available.

decided_by.description: Decision origin. Approval remains human-only in the current rollout.

$comment: Approved Decision V2 is the stable ingestion input boundary for accepted memory candidates. The ingestion executor must look up candidate_id for idempotency/audit and generate its own final FalkorDB Memory.id.
